response.step_by_step_log:
1. Identified the video as a Hololive live event (#博衣こより生誕Live2026).
2. Segmented video based on song performances.
3. Song 1 detected: 'My Soul, Your Beats!' (Angel Beats!). Performer is Hakui Koyori (et al). Searched: '"My Soul, Your Beats!" Lia Angel Beats Japanese and English lyrics'. Found lyrics.
4. Song 2 detected: '管制塔より' (From the Control Tower). Performer is Hakui Koyori. Credits list Shota Horie. Searched: '"管制塔より" 博衣こより Japanese and English lyrics'. Found lyrics.
response.global_summary: A short excerpt of a live performance by Hololive VTuber Hakui Koyori. It features two songs: 'My Soul, Your Beats!' (an Angel Beats! cover) and a new original song '管制塔より' (From the Control Tower).

scenes.description: Hakui Koyori and others perform a cover of 'My Soul, Your Beats!'. On-screen text includes '#博衣こより生誕Live2026'.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
予感と期待と迷いの中へ
踏み出すことは
恐れじゃない
そんな日常に
ほんの少し胸を張って歩き出せる
目覚めては繰り返す 眠い朝は
襟のタイをきつく締め
教室のドアくぐると
ほんの少し胸を張って歩き出せる
目覚めては繰り返す 眠い朝は
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Into the midst of premonitions, expectations, and hesitation
Taking that step
Is not fear
Into a daily life like that
I was able to start walking with my chest held a little high
Even on a sleepy morning when I wake up and repeat it
I tighten the tie on my collar
When I pass through the classroom door
I was able to start walking with my chest held a little high
Even on a sleepy morning when I wake up and repeat it

scenes.description: Hakui Koyori performs her original song '管制塔より'. Credits on-screen list Shota Horie.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
ぽつり灯り 管制塔
砂嵐の向こうへ
祈るように綴った
これからのこと
ラジオネーム 匿名希望
お便り 届いていますか
この世界がいつからか
まるで他人事のように
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
A single light, the control tower
Beyond the sandstorm
Like a prayer, I wrote down
What is to come
Radio name, Anonymous
Letters, can you hear me?
Since when did this world
Become like someone else's affair?
